sourcesContent:
export default {
  welcomeBack: 'Welcome back',
  enterDetails: 'Please enter your details',
  email: 'Email',
  emailPlaceholder: 'anna@gmail.com',
  password: 'Password',
  passwordPlaceholder: 'Enter your password',
  rememberMe: 'Remember for 30 days',
  forgotPassword: 'Forgot password?',
  loginAccount: 'Log in',
  emailFormatError: 'Please enter a valid email address',
  loginFailEmpty: 'Please enter your email and password.',
  loginFailCheck: 'Login failed. Please check your email and password.',
}
